explanations.1: This special comment tells Docker to use a specific version of the Dockerfile syntax parser, which gives you access to newer Docker features.
explanations.3: The 'AS base' part names this stage 'base' so you can refer to it later if you want to build multiple images from different stages.
explanations.5: The backslash at the end of the line lets you continue a long command across multiple lines for readability.
explanations.7: This deletes the temporary package cache files that apt-get left behind, which shrinks the final image size.
explanations.12: Instead of running a normal application, this keeps the container alive indefinitely by running a command that does nothing—useful for debugging or testing.
